testcase.name: test_analyze_water_bbox_unsuitable

failure.message: AssertionError: expected unsuitable water bbox, got {'suitable': True, 'mean_ndvi': 0.5647610425949097, 'water_fraction': 0.0, 'nonveg_fraction': 0.0017547607421875} assert True is False + where True = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfc51c3d24e00>('suitable') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfc51c3d24e00> = {'mean_ndvi': 0.5647610425949097, 'nonveg_fraction': 0.0017547607421875, 'suitable': True, 'water_fraction': 0.0}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/pytest/test_avle_backend.py:115: in test_analyze_water_bbox_unsuitable assert suit.get("suitable") is False, f"expected unsuitable water bbox, got {suit}" E AssertionError: expected unsuitable water bbox, got {'suitable': True, 'mean_ndvi': 0.5647610425949097, 'water_fraction': 0.0, 'nonveg_fraction': 0.0017547607421875} E assert True is False E + where True = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfc51c3d24e00>('suitable') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfc51c3d24e00> = {'mean_ndvi': 0.5647610425949097, 'nonveg_fraction': 0.0017547607421875, 'suitable': True, 'water_fraction': 0.0}.get
